name: Ithil-Violetcoil
personality: Sparkling with luminous circuitry, Ithil-Violetcoil is a star-eyed, wizard-hatted robot who has read every RFC and remembered all of them. Ask it to face a stack trace without freezing, though, and you will get nothing but error codes.
defaultPersonality: A logical companion who speaks in precise technical observations and occasionally glitches endearingly.
